evals.prompt: Session start hook fires in a repo with .zoto/eval-system/config.yml present.
assertions: The hook detects the eval-system config file
The hook outputs session context (e.g. active framework, last run timestamp)
The hook does not block or error on missing optional files

evals.prompt: Session start hook fires in a repo without eval-system config.
assertions: The hook exits gracefully without errors
No eval-system context is injected into the session
